case_title: KEVYN D. LUTTON VS. RENEWAL BY ANDERSEN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RENEWAL BY ANDERSEN CINDY COONEY GENERAL MANAGER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,006.37 FILED BY LUTTON, KEVYN D. AS TO DEFENDANT RENEWAL BY ANDERSEN CINDY COONEY GENERAL MANAGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-30-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDCIE. PARTIES HAVE REACHED AN AGREEMENT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CYNTHIA COONEY--PRESIDENT AND BRENT ANDERSON--INSTALLATION MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 - SERVED DEC-29-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RENEWAL BY ANDERSEN CINDY COONEY GENERAL MANAGER
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTRE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
